title: T-051 — UI: D365 DLQ admin screen + inspect/replay/resolve modals (SCR-08-06 / MODAL-08-10)
prompt:
# T-051 — D365 DLQ admin UI

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-08-06, MODAL-08-10, §8.2.7, §3.2 RBAC (Prod Manager/Admin)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:499-557 (dlq_screen); production/modals.jsx:242-288 (dlq_inspect_modal)

## Goal
Build the D365 DLQ admin screen under `/admin/integrations/d365/dlq` and the inspect/replay/resolve Dialog. Reads list + health stats from T-042 GET, opens read-only payload inspector, fires audited replay and resolve actions. RBAC: Prod Manager OR Admin only.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/page.tsx (RSC) — dlq_screen parity: 4-tab connector health strip (Connector/Queue depth/Events in DLQ/Oldest age), 3 tabs (DLQ open / Resolved / All events) with COUNT badges, paginated table with Inspect/Retry inline actions, design-principle Alert (MES is source of truth).
2. apps/web/components/production/dlq-inspect-modal.tsx ('use client') — shadcn Dialog: metadata grid (Event/Attempts/Moved at/Last error), raw error payload `pre` block (read-only), `Retry push` and `Mark resolved` Server Actions wrapping T-042; `Mark resolved` requires `resolution_note` ≥10 chars (zod) before Submit enables.
3. RBAC: page returns 403 for users without Prod Manager OR Admin role; non-authorized users see no nav link.
4. Literal `data-prototype-label` markers: `dlq_screen`, `dlq_inspect_modal`. All copy via next-intl.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the DLQ admin page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:499-557 and modals.jsx:242-288, then it has the same connector health strip + 3 tabs (with COUNT badges) + paginated table + design-principle Alert and the inspect modal has metadata grid + raw payload pre block + Retry + Mark-resolved — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist + visible `data-prototype-label` markers.
2. Given the Mark-resolved Dialog is open and `resolution_note` is empty or shorter than 10 chars, when user clicks Submit, then it is disabled (and server still 422s if forced) — DLQ row is not mutated.
3. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts for empty DLQ, open DLQ with row, inspect modal opened, and resolve flow plus Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (or documented blocker + RTL/snapshot fallback).

## Test strategy
- RED: apps/web/app/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/__tests__/dlq-page.test.tsx + apps/web/components/production/__tests__/dlq-inspect-modal.test.tsx asserting parity, RBAC 403, COUNT-badge derivation, Mark-resolved zod gating and `data-prototype-label` markers before code exists.
- Run `pnpm vitest run apps/web/app/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/__tests__/dlq-page.test.tsx apps/web/components/production/__tests__/dlq-inspect-modal.test.tsx`
- For UI parity, capture screenshots + Playwright trace; attach paths.
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow non-Prod-Manager/Admin users to load the page or call replay/resolve.
- Do not delete DLQ rows from the UI (resolve uses audit-preserving status change via T-042).
- Do not display raw D365 credentials or secrets in payload view.
- Do not bypass zod `resolution_note` min(10) before enabling Submit.
